event_name: Wildwood Park Summer Concert Series — Opening Night

seo.title: Wildwood Park Summer Concert Series Opening Night 2026 | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: The Wildwood Park for the Arts Summer Concert Series kicks off in June. Outdoor music on the park's main stage in west Little Rock.

description: Wildwood Park for the Arts opens its beloved summer concert series with a Friday night under the Arkansas sky. The 77-acre sculpture park transforms into one of the metro's most magical outdoor music venues each summer, with the main stage framed by towering pines and open-air seating spread across the lawn. Opening night typically draws 500–800 attendees who bring blankets, low-back chairs, and picnic dinners to make a full evening of it. Check the Wildwood website for the specific lineup — past seasons have featured national touring acts alongside regional headliners.

image.alt: Outdoor summer concert at Wildwood Park for the Arts in west Little Rock
